items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Now let me look at the existing schemas package to understand the patterns:
Let me look at the actual schema source files:
I have a clear picture of the existing patterns. Now I'll implement the schemas.  **Intent: Creating task schemas**
Now add comprehensive tests for the task schemas:
Now let me build and run tests:
Build succeeded. Now run the tests:
All 74 tests pass (including the 44 new task schema tests). Build and tests both succeed. Let me verify the final state of the files:
Now let me run the post-change review and syntax check:

Review shows: - **No breaking changes** — purely additive (new schemas + barrel exports) - **Minimal structural impact** (1% footprint) - **No syntax errors** - **Risk: MODERATE (49/100)** — due to novelty score (new schemas), which is expected  Now let me commit and mark the pipeline as complete:
Commit successful. Now mark the pipeline phase as complete:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add TaskStatus, Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus Zod schemas for kanban-task-board" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board schema-dev 2>&1
